title: Property Cleaning & Maintenance Business
supportTraining: Full training and support included, no industry experience necessary
description:
Opportunity to acquire an exterior property cleaning business serving residential and commercial clients. The company provides professional cleaning services designed to help property owners maintain attractive, well-kept buildings and outdoor spaces.

Services typically include exterior surface cleaning for homes and buildings, driveways, sidewalks, patios, and other outdoor areas that benefit from routine maintenance. Property owners often rely on professional cleaning services to restore curb appeal and protect exterior surfaces.

Revenue is generated through residential service calls as well as commercial accounts that require ongoing maintenance. Many clients schedule recurring service visits throughout the year, creating repeat business and opportunities to build long-term customer relationships.

Operations are supported by specialized cleaning equipment, scheduling systems, and trained service technicians who perform work directly at customer locations. The owner typically focuses on managing operations, coordinating service requests, and expanding the client base.

Demand for exterior property cleaning continues to grow as homeowners and businesses increasingly outsource maintenance tasks. With opportunities to expand service routes, add technicians, and develop additional commercial accounts, this business offers strong potential in the property services sector.

Ad#:2482248
